film.title: Diary of a Hitman
film.overview: A veteran hitman, Dekker is ready to call it quits and leave the profession. His final job, however, proves to be trickier than expected when a sadistic man recruits the assassin to kill his wife, Jain, and their baby, but he can’t bring himself to do the job, complicating all of their lives.

dialogues.dialogue: I function better when the pop isn't personal.  why am I getting my whole fee up front?  I'm not proud of my past.  Snorted a number of prime years of my life away.  Her doing. She made me crazy.
I can do this!  This is who I am!  We are the W/ld Cats and we couldn't be prouder  And /f you don't bel/eve /t we'll shout a l/ttle louder  Shut up!
